title: Stigmaphyllon bonariense

The genus Stigmaphyllon is a part of this family and consists of various species of tropical plants. These plants are native to Central and South America, and are characterized by their unique flowers and leaves. Stigmaphyllon bonariense, in particular, is native to the countries in South America such as Argentina, Bolivia, Paraguay, and Uruguay. Further classification of Stigmaphyllon bonariense may involve more specific taxonomic categorization at the species level.
